nodes.label: Functions & Variables
nodes.summary: The foundation of Python programming. Learn to define functions, use variables, and understand basic data types.

nodes.label: Conditionals
nodes.summary: Control program flow with if/elif/else statements, boolean logic, and comparison operators.

nodes.label: Loops
nodes.summary: Repeat actions with while and for loops. Learn list iteration and control flow with break/continue.

nodes.label: Exceptions
nodes.summary: Handle errors gracefully with try/except blocks. Write robust programs that handle invalid input.

nodes.label: Libraries
nodes.summary: Leverage Python's vast ecosystem of standard library modules and third-party packages via pip.

nodes.label: Unit Tests
nodes.summary: Write automated tests with pytest to ensure your code works correctly and catch regressions.

nodes.label: File I/O
nodes.summary: Read and write files, work with CSV data, and persist information beyond program execution.

nodes.label: Regular Expressions
nodes.summary: Pattern-match strings using the re module. Extract data, validate input, and transform text.

nodes.label: OOP
nodes.summary: Model real-world concepts with classes and objects. Learn inheritance, properties, and design patterns.

nodes.label: Et Cetera
nodes.summary: Advanced Python features: sets, generators, list comprehensions, type hints, and more.

nodes.label: Search
nodes.summary: Find solutions in state spaces using BFS, DFS, A*, and adversarial minimax search.

nodes.label: Knowledge
nodes.summary: Represent and reason about knowledge using propositional logic and inference algorithms.

nodes.label: Uncertainty
nodes.summary: Handle uncertainty with probability theory, Bayesian networks, and sampling methods.

nodes.label: Optimization
nodes.summary: Solve constraint satisfaction problems and find optimal solutions with local search.

nodes.label: Learning
nodes.summary: Learn patterns from data using supervised learning, k-NN, SVM, and reinforcement learning.

nodes.label: Neural Networks
nodes.summary: Build deep learning models with CNNs and backpropagation using TensorFlow.

nodes.label: Language
nodes.summary: Process natural language with TF-IDF, word vectors, transformers, and language models.
